task_completion.description: Verify that the required payroll modules are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left navigation menu in Manager.io should display 'Employees', 'Payslip Items', and 'Payslips'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Gross Salary' payslip item was created as an Earnings/Addition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Payslip Items' screen, there should be an entry named 'Gross Salary' categorized under Earnings or Additions.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Income Tax Withholding' payslip item was created as a Deduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Payslip Items' screen, there should be an entry named 'Income Tax Withholding' categorized under Deductions.

task_completion.description: Verify that the employee record for Maria Anders was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Employees' screen, 'Maria Anders' should be visible in the list of employees.

task_completion.description: Verify that a payslip was created for Maria Anders with the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Payslips' screen or on the payslip view itself, there should be a payslip assigned to 'Maria Anders' with the issue date '2025-01-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the payslip contains the correct gross, deduction, and net amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payslip details must show 'Gross Salary' of 4,500.00, 'Income Tax Withholding' of 675.00, and a final Net Pay of 3,825.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web or desktop interface with standard menus, buttons, and forms, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The employee and payslip data should be visible within the Manager.io data tables or view screens, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by printing the expected output in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state should be a screenshot of the Manager.io application showing the generated payslip, not a terminal window echoing the success criteria.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Modules: 'Employees', 'Payslip Items', 'Payslips'. Expected Employee Name: 'Maria Anders'. Expected Payslip Date: '2025-01-31'. Expected Gross Amount: 4500.00. Expected Deduction Amount (Income Tax Withholding): 675.00. Expected Net Amount: 3825.00.
